name: Apollo.io MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Apollo.io — the B2B sales intelligence platform with 275M+ contacts and 65M+ companies. Enables agents to search contacts and companies, retrieve contact information, find email addresses, enrich lead data, and integrate Apollo's prospecting database into AI-driven sales and marketing workflows.
use_cases: Searching for B2B contacts and companies from prospecting agents
Enriching lead data with contact information from sales automation agents
Finding decision-makers at target companies from outreach agents
Researching company information for sales preparation from sales intelligence agents
not_for: Consumer contact data (Apollo.io is B2B only)
Mass unsolicited email campaigns (violates Apollo ToS and CAN-SPAM/GDPR)
best_when: A B2B sales team using Apollo.io wants AI agents to automate lead research, contact enrichment, and prospecting — integrating Apollo's vast contact database into sales workflows.
avoid_when: You need consumer data or B2C prospecting — Apollo is business-to-business. Also avoid using for spam campaigns — GDPR and CAN-SPAM apply to prospecting data usage.

auth.notes: Apollo.io API key required. Get from Apollo account Settings → Integrations → API. Set APOLLO_API_KEY environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Apollo.io free: 50 export credits/month; limited API access
pricing.notes: Apollo.io requires paid subscription for meaningful API access. Community MCP (not official Apollo). MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Apollo.io API: rate limits per plan; export credits consumed per contact reveal

known_agent_gotchas: Export credits are consumed per contact reveal — monitor credit usage in agent loops to avoid overage
GDPR/CCPA: Contact data usage must comply with applicable privacy laws in your jurisdiction
Apollo data quality varies — some emails may be outdated or incorrect; verify before use
Community MCP (not official Apollo.io) — test API compatibility with your Apollo plan
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key auth. Contact data is B2B PII — handle in compliance with GDPR/CCPA. Keep API key secure — controls access to contact reveal credits. Audit contact data usage for privacy compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B contact PII subject to GDPR/CCPA. HTTPS. API key controls credit consumption. Privacy compliance responsibility on user. Community MCP.
